regional_cost_note: HVAC engineers in Whangārei typically charge $8,500–$20,000 for a residential ducted system and $150–$420/m² of conditioned space for commercial work. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. HVAC work must comply with NZ Building Code G4 and NZBC F7 — use a licensed installer.
